basic_details.job_title: ECHS Palchan Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Palchan (ECHS Palchan)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with minimum 5 years experience after internship
qualification.details: Medical Officer (MO): MBBS with minimum 5 years experience after internship. Desirable: Merit in MBBS PG/Additional qualification, Experience more than 05 years.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ECHS Palchan Medical Officer (MO) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Palchan Medical Officer (MO) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ECHS Palchan Medical Officer (MO) recruitment is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer (MO) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Medical Officer (MO) position will receive a salary of Rs. 95,000 per month. This is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications for the Medical Officer (MO) post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Medical Officer (MO) post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree with a minimum of 5 years of experience after completing their internship.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Medical Officer (MO) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Officer (MO) post will be based on an interview. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria will be shortlisted for the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the ECHS Palchan located?
faq.answer: ECHS Palchan is located in Kullu, Himachal Pradesh. The recruitment is for this specific location.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Medical Officer (MO) post in the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Palchan.

faq.question: Q9. When is the interview scheduled for the Medical Officer (MO) post?
faq.answer: The interview for the Medical Officer (MO) post is scheduled to be held on 06th July 2026. Candidates should be prepared for the interview on this date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS, which is www.echs.gov.in. Links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
